name: mussel-counter-simple
description: Desktop app for running mussel detection with an Electron frontend and Python backend.
author: Nate Williams, Austin Ashley, Fernando Gomez, Siddharth Rakshit

scripts.package:desktop: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build && electron-forge package
scripts.make:desktop: npm run verify:packaging-assets && npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build && electron-forge make
scripts.make:desktop:win: npm run verify:packaging-assets && npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build:cpu && electron-forge make --platform=win32
scripts.make:desktop:mac: npm run verify:packaging-assets && npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build:cpu && electron-forge make --platform=darwin
